prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in prometheus/prometheus that implement the TSDB write-ahead log (WAL): the WAL segment creation and rotation, the WAL record encoding (series, samples, tombstones), the WAL repair on corrupt segments, and the checkpoint creation to truncate old WAL data.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the prometheus-monitoring fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in prometheus/prometheus that implement the TSDB write-ahead log (WAL): the WAL segment creation and rotation, the WAL record encoding (series, samples, tombstones), the WAL repair on corrupt segments, and the checkpoint creation to truncate old WAL data.
